description_long: This is a low-top sneaker featuring a vibrant, multicolored patterned fabric upper with geometric and wave motifs in red, blue, black, and white. The shoe has red laces threaded through five pairs of eyelets, and the tongue is partially visible beneath the laces. The sole is flat and appears to be made of white rubber, providing a clean contrast to the busy upper. The interior is lined with a lighter material, and the heel area is slightly padded for comfort. The overall design is casual and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior.
description: A colorful, patterned low-top sneaker with red laces and a white rubber sole, featuring geometric and wave motifs. The shoe is casual and visually striking, ideal for urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, red laces, and the central geometric pattern on the upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full patterned fabric, red laces, and the flat white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open heel, interior lining, and the back portion of the patterned upper.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the intricate pattern, red laces, and the continuous white sole.
